briefs.headline: Tour de France Ends with Epic Sprint Finish as Sam Bennett Takes Final Stage Win
briefs.lede: Irish sprinter Sam Bennett clinched a record-breaking stage win on the Champs-Élysées, wrapping up the 2021 Tour de France.

stories.title: Tour de France 2021 Wraps Up with Emotional Final Stage
stories.body: [The three-week Grand Tour concluded in Paris with Bennett's victory on the final stage. Tadej Pogačar of UAE Team Emirates retained his overall lead to win his second consecutive yellow jersey.]

stories.title: Benoot Wins Time Trial at European Championships
stories.body: [Belgium's Wout van Aert took silver and defending champion Viktor Campenaerts of Belgium finished fourth, as Jasper Stuyven of Trek-Segafredo claimed the gold in the men's road race time trial at the European Championships.]

stories.title: Specialized S-Works Venge Now Available with Dura-Ace Di2 Integration
stories.body: [Specialized's top-tier aero road bike, the S-Works Venge, has been updated with Shimano's Dura-Ace Di2 electronic groupset for improved shifting performance and sleek aesthetics.]

stories.title: Women's Tour of Scotland Announces 2021 Route
stories.body: [Organizers have revealed the route for this year's Women's Tour of Scotland, a five-day stage race scheduled to take place in September. The event will feature many of the world's top women riders and is part of the UCI Women's WorldTour.]

quote.text: It feels like I've been chasing this for a long time. To finally get the win is amazing.

briefs.headline: UAE Tour stage 4: Dutch rider Tiesj Benoot wins as Tadej Pogacar takes overall lead
briefs.lede: Tiesj Benoot of Israel-Premier Tech stormed to victory on stage 4 of the UAE Tour, while Slovenian rider Tadej Pogacar took over the overall lead.

stories.title: UAE Tour Stage 4: Benoot Claims Victory as Pogacar Takes Overall Lead
stories.body: The 207km stage from Al Ain to Jebel Hafeet was a grueling test for riders. Israel-Premier Tech's Tiesj Benoot attacked on the final climb to take his first win of the season. Pogacar's teammate Brandon McNulty placed second.

stories.title: Wout van Aert to Skip Volta ao Algarve
stories.body: The Belgian rider will skip the Portuguese event due to fatigue after a busy start to the season, affecting his preparation for Milano-Sanremo.

stories.title: Specialized Launches New S-Works Venge SBC
stories.body: The American manufacturer released its latest aero road bike featuring an advanced cockpit optimised for airflow, already used by Sagan and Evenepoel.

stories.title: Strava Launches Virtual Club Challenge Series
stories.body: Strava announced a new series of virtual club challenges including hill climbs, time trials and group rides with prizes for winning clubs.

quote.text: The final climb was brutal, but I knew I had a chance to win.
